input.background: An instrument consisting of $k$ units operates for a time $t$. Each unit has a reliability (probability of failure-free performance) of $p$ during time $t$, and units fail independently. After time $t$, the instrument stops functioning, and a technician inspects and replaces failed units, taking $s$ time to replace one unit.
input.question: Calculate $P$ when $k=10$, $p=0.9$, $t=25 \mathrm{~h}$, and $s=20 \mathrm{~min}$.

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 2: Distribution Functions and Its Applications
